title: Daedalus plan-maturation workshop protocol (serial + parallel authorship)

serial.note: Retained ONLY for genuinely small deltas (methodology ruling). Alternating author/reviewer per round; author = claude on odd rounds.
convergence_requires: zero unresolved objections (absence is NOT a disposition; only explicit resolved/superseded/withdrawn records retire an objection)
real, distinct author+reviewer provenance keys (provider:response_id; placeholder/self ids rejected)
reviewer bound_hash equals the round's output candidate hash (the reviewer binds the author's exact artifact)

parallel.note: The forward methodology for real plan design: two seats author IN PARALLEL from one frozen frame; the integrated candidate must descend from both.
convergence_requires: both source roles present with real, distinct provenance keys
integrator is a real seat call (validated provenance key of its own)
descends_from is content-committed inside the candidate body and is EXACTLY the two source refs
obligation matrix is field-complete AND a strict bijection over the constraints-declared obligation id set
all five seat-call provenance keys (2 authors, integrator, 2 verifiers) pairwise distinct
both verifiers AFFIRMATIVELY attest the literal verdict 'preserved' (missing/unknown verdicts never converge)
parallel.conflict_rule: a 'violated' verdict or any non-empty conflict list routes to The Eye (terminal needs-eye) — never silently blended

selection.missing_adapter: blocked: PARALLEL_AUTHORSHIP_UNAVAILABLE (fail-closed; never silently downgrades to serial)

objection_identity: controller-recomputed sha256 over {scope, claim, sorted evidence_refs}; a model-asserted objection_hash is discarded
why: The serial author-reviewer loop optimizes the wrong objective (10 of 11 confirmed Clotho Phase 1 defects attacked repair-introduced behavior at ~1-delta lag). Parallel constraint/implementation authorship with structural obligation coverage targets the smallest complete behavioral model that satisfies the invariant.
change_rule: Changing seats, states, terminals, obligation fields, or convergence rules requires an Eye ruling + a Daedalus delta + TELOS re-authorization (docs/institutional-memory/CHANGE-PROTOCOL.md); this contract must then be updated in the same change or verify-contracts fails.

oracle.test: build-gate/scripts/test-daedalus.mjs (state machine, objection ledger, coverage bijection, provenance distinctness); build-gate/scripts/test-proposal-orchestrator.mjs (PARALLEL_AUTHORSHIP_UNAVAILABLE fail-closed)
oracle.contract_equals_code: docs/institutional-memory/verify-contracts.mjs (deep-equals the constants + probes each terminal behaviorally)
